title: Transparent Tooltips
body: # Transparent Tooltips for Fabric Born of a conversation in the Fabric Discord. Transparent Tooltips adds a slider in Accessibility Settings to adjust the opacity of the tooltip background when hovering items in an inventory or certain buttons. **Transparent Tooltips requires [Fabric Loader](https://github.com/FabricMC/fabric-loader) and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**
